title: Esteemed Teacher Tian Zhao
content:
Esteemed Teacher Tian Zhao
 is a member of the 
Sovereign Council
. He was sent to safeguard and preside over the 
Seven-Colored Realm
 portal inside the 
Cultivation Alliance
 headquarters.

History
[
]

He attempted to stop 
Wang Lin
 when the latter stormed the 
Cultivation Alliance
 to save 
Qing Shui
. However, he was easily killed by Wang Lin after he released his Celestial Qi.

Wang Lin also took his three Joss Flames Dragon Soul and gifted one to 
Master Flamespark
 and one to 
Shengong Hu
 while he freed the last one after it killed all the 
Outer Realm
 cultivators present in the Alliance headquarters.
